text: This is a debug request to verify fallback behavior in the local server runtime. The payload is intentionally long enough to exceed the eighty word minimum and force a detector call path. We include additional plain content so the endpoint cannot fail due to short text validation and must attempt the configured detector target. If local detector is unavailable, the fallback should switch to Hugging Face in local runtime according to the latest route changes. This sentence and the next one ensure the total number of words stays above the minimum threshold required by the detector route for analysis.
